Items.Title: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach quarter-finals
Items.Description: Gregor Kobel is Switzerland's penalty hero, after pulling off a stunning shootout save from Colombia's Cucho Hernandez to help set up a quarter-final clash with Argentina.

Items.Title: Watch every penalty from Switzerland v Colombia shootout
Items.Description: Watch the full penalties as Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in the shootout to advance to the quarter-finals.

Items.Title: Who are the ITV pundits, commentators and presenters for Switzerland vs Colombia?
